CREATE TABLE transactions (id INT PRIMARY KEY, description VARCHAR(255), status VARCHAR(50));
CREATE TABLE transaction_details (transaction_id INT, detail VARCHAR(255), FOREIGN KEY (transaction_id) REFERENCES transactions(id));
INSERT INTO transactions (id, description, status) VALUES (1, 'Initial transaction', 'pending');
INSERT INTO transaction_details (transaction_id, detail) VALUES (1, 'Detail 1 for transaction 1');
INSERT INTO transaction_details (transaction_id, detail) VALUES (1, 'Detail 2 for transaction 1');
SELECT id, description, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM transaction_details WHERE transaction_id = transactions.id) AS detail_count FROM transactions WHERE status = 'pending';
SELECT a.id, a.description FROM transactions a JOIN transaction_details b ON a.id = b.transaction_id WHERE b.detail LIKE 'Detail%';
SELECT * FROM transactions WHERE id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM transactions WHERE status = 'pending');
SELECT * FROM transactions WHERE status IN (SELECT status FROM transactions WHERE id > 0);
INSERT INTO transactions (id, description, status) VALUES (2, 'Second transaction', 'complete');
SELECT * FROM transactions UNION SELECT * FROM transaction_details WHERE transaction_id IS NULL;
